name: Brownie Cake Delight (Pil)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Whipped topping, reduced-fat, nondairy -- frozen, thawed
2 cups Fresh strawberries, stemmed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare brownies according to package directions and bake in an 11x7-inch pan. Cool completely in the pan.
2. In a small bowl, blend the fruit spread with 2 tablespoons of water until smooth. In a medium bowl, combine the whipped topping and almond extract.
3. Stem the strawberries and halve them (tip: twist to remove).
4. Cut the brownie crosswise into half (two pieces measuring 5-1/2 by 7-inches). Place one piece flat-side down on a serving dish. Spread with fruit spread; top with 1 cup whipped topping.
5. Spread the remaining fruit spread on the second piece's crusty side. Spread most of the whipping topping on top, avoiding the edges. Carefully position the prepared brownie over the whipped topping of the first piece.
6. Arrange strawberry halves on the whipped topping. Drizzle chocolate sauce over that. Garnish with sprigs of mint (optional).
PIL = Publications International, Ltd (Illinois)
CAL 193 (14% cff) total fat 3 g sat fat <1 g chol <1 mg sodium 140mg carb 41 g dietary fiber <1g protein 2 g calc 11 mg iron 1 mg vit A 11 RE vit C 11 mg
